title: Autonomous-Dev Deploy Policy Document v1
description: Validates a deploy policy document: an ordered list of typed rules with target predicates and effects. Rules match on discovered attributes (tags/kind/env/capability) — never on hard-coded instance ids (invariant #674). Cross-reference: issues #668, #669.

rules.description: Ordered list of policy rules. Evaluated top-to-bottom; deny-wins merge semantics.

policyRule.description: A single policy rule with an optional target predicate and a typed effect.

id.description: Unique stable rule identifier within the document (lowercase-kebab).

description.description: Optional human-readable explanation shown in CLI output and audit logs.

when.description: Optional target predicate. When absent the rule matches every target.

type.description: Rule-type discriminator. Open string — built-in types: placement, affinity, quota, blast-radius, maintenance-window. Plugins may register additional types.

effect.description: Outcome when this rule matches and its type-evaluator fires. Deny-wins merge semantics.

params.description: Rule-type-specific parameters. Validated and interpreted by the registered evaluator for this 'type' key.

targetPredicate.description: Predicate for matching a DeployTarget by discovered attributes. All fields are optional and ANDed. INVARIANT: never reference specific instance ids — use kind/env/tag/capability only (invariant #674).

kind.description: Match by exact target kind string (e.g., 'swarm-node', 'k3s-cluster').

tag.description: Match targets with this exact tag key=value pair.

capability.description: Match targets that advertise this capability token.

rules.description: ML services must deploy to GPU nodes
All prod deploys require senior-engineer approval
Prod deploys only allowed weekdays 06:00–22:00 UTC
Limit single action to at most 3 targets
